scripts.fix: node -e "const os = require('os'); const fs = require('fs'); const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const isWin = os.platform() === 'win32'; const script = isWin ? '.\\fix.bat' : './fix.sh'; try { if (!isWin) { fs.chmodSync(script, '0755'); } execSync(script, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch(e) { console.error('Fix script execution failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); }"
